name: Al-Perturbed Fe-Mn-Cr-Ni Modification Concept
description: Low-criticality modification concept incorporating a minor aluminum addition to perturb stacking fault energy (SFE) and evaluate phase-risk stability boundaries.
disclaimer: This composition is a conceptual search seed only and is not yet calibrated against a validated thermodynamic, corrosion, cryogenic, weldability, or hydrogen embrittlement model.

metadata.target_structure: FCC solid-solution matrix with minor Al perturbation
